feed.title: A Bitcoin-native LLM: dataset, architecture and open questions

entry.title: A Bitcoin-native LLM: dataset, architecture and open questions
entry.summary: The email expresses an interest in utilizing a specific tool developed by the recipient, referred to as "@Tsua0002," behind a paywall known as L402. The sender proposes hosting this tool on their website, PPQ.AI, suggesting that this collaboration could significantly increase traffic and provide monetization opportunities for the tool. The proposal indicates a partnership where the tool's capabilities can be leveraged to enhance the functionality and appeal of the PPQ.AI platform while offering financial benefits through increased user engagement behind the paywall.
